sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51745" key="kaqe/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθέννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n51745.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clothe</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταέννυμι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθένς</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατατίθημι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
